t04020101.ExpAdvice: When the phone is flash charging, its charger will transform high voltage into low voltage. During this time, there will be a large amount of energy conversion, thereby causing heat. We recommend charging the phone in an environment with good heat dissipation.

t04020102.ExpAdvice: Using the flash for a long time generates heat. Do not use the flash for a long period to avoid damage to the flash.

t04020103.ExpAdvice: Prolonged high-brightness usage. Reduce the screen brightness or set it to auto brightness.

t04020104.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up due to poor network signal. In a location with poor signal, the phone antenna has to increase its power to search for signals in a wider area, thereby generating more heat. Go to "Settings - Mobile network - More settings" and enable Smart 5G. If you cannot determine the current signal status, consult the local network carrier.

t04020105.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up due to poor network signal. In a location with poor signal, the phone antenna has to increase its power to search for signals in a wider area, thereby generating more heat. If you cannot determine the current signal status, consult the local network carrier.

t04020106.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up because background app %1 occupies too much CPU. If Wi-Fi, GPS, NFC, Bluetooth and other functions are turned on at the same time to search for signals in the background, the phone will get hotter. It is recommended to clear background apps and turn off unused functions. You may clear background apps or restart the phone.

t04020107.ExpAdvice: %1 is a high-load app, which takes up much CPU and causes the phone to heat up. Avoid prolonged heavy phone usage. Wait until it cools down to avoid damage to its components.

t04020108.ExpAdvice:
The phone's GPS is in use. The phone may get hot if it searches for and sends satellite signals for an extend period of time to update location information.
Check with the user whether they have turned on navigation or any third-party location-based app is automatically obtaining location information.

t04020109.ExpAdvice:
The phone heats up because some apps run concurrently in the background. It is recommended to regularly clear background caches.
① Please check if any software is being downloaded in the background.
② Check if sync, Cloud Service, and other functions are turned on.

t04020110.ExpAdvice:

t04020111.ExpAdvice:
Lengthy call detected The buildup of heat is normal when the phone is on a prolonged call as the phone's signal antenna, microphone, and speaker continue working during the call.
For tips on how to cool a phone down, please refer to the knowledge base "Phone heats up during phone calls".

t04020112.ExpAdvice:
Prolonged/frequent camera usage detected When taking pictures or videos, the camera, CPU, GPU, and other devices of the mobile phone will work at the same time, and the mobile phone is running under high load, which will cause the temperature of the mobile phone to rise.
For tips on how to cool a phone down when using its camera, please refer to the knowledge base "Phone heats up when taking photos and videos".

t04020113.ExpAdvice: Ask the user not to use the phone in a high temperature environment and use a DC power supply to check the phone for power leakage.
t04020113.ExpDetail: Heating caused by the environment or hardware

t04020114.ExpAdvice: Please ask the user on how the phone is used, and use that in combination with the power-consuming apps and power consumption diagnosis to investigate the issue. If nothing is abnormal, advise the user to check the phone for power leakage at a service center.

t04020116.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up because it is used while being charged. It is normal for batteries or chargers to heat up while charging, and using your phone while charging will generate even more heat.
t04020116.ExpDetail: Overheating caused by using while charging

t04020117.ExpAdvice: Heat generation during charging is normal. It is recommended that you charge your phone in a well-ventilated place, where heat gets dissipated easily. Do not charge your phone on a sofa, on clothes, or in the sun.
t04020117.ExpDetail: Overheating while charging (Screen on when charging: %1; Foreground app when charging: %2)

t04020118.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up significantly when playing the game %1. During gaming, chips such as the CPU and GPU of your phone have to run at high performance to ensure picture quality and fluency. Such a heavy load will cause the phone to get hotter. To improve this issue, lower settings (resolution and frame rate), reduce screen brightness, and turn down the volume for games.
t04020118.ExpDetail: Overheating during gameplay (Game: %1; Image quality: %2; Resolution: %3; Gaming mode: %4)

t04020119.ExpAdvice: The phone heats up because you play games while charging. Energy conversion that occurs during charging will cause heat. When you are playing a game while charging, phone chips such as the CPU and GPU have to run at high performance to ensure picture quality and fluency, which will generate even more heat. Please avoid using your phone while charging whenever possible.

t04020120.ExpAdvice: You are playing games in a place with poor signals where the signal transmitter has to work overtime searching for a connection, which can easily cause the phone to heat up. In addition, phone chips such as the CPU and GPU have to run at high performance during gaming to ensure picture quality and fluency, which will generate even more heat. Please move to a location with a good network if possible.
